svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD App["Application
(Pict views, models, controllers -- unchanged)"] -->|"RestClient.getJSON / putJSON / ..."| RestClient["RestClient (wrapped executeJSONRequest)"] RestClient --> Interceptor["Interceptor"] Interceptor -->|"Match prefix"| IPCOrator["IPC Orator
+ meadow endpoints"] Interceptor -->|"No match"| OriginalRC["Original RestClient -> HTTP"] IPCOrator --> SQLite["SQLite
(sql.js)"] SQLite -->|"mutations flow back to tracker"| DirtyTracker["Dirty Tracker
(in-mem)"] ","style":"notebook"}
